impact: This completes the fixture-first validation milestone before any live crawl work by giving the PP&D daemon a single local command that checks committed fixtures, contract validators, daemon health, and ignore rules for private/session artifacts.
summary: Add a deterministic PP&D validation command for fixtures, schema contracts, daemon self-test, and private-data ignore coverage.
target_task: Task checkbox-14: Add PP&D validation command that checks fixtures, schemas, daemon self-test, and private-data ignore coverage.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
